requested.descriptionHtml: A deployment protection rule was requested for an environment.
requested.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity relating to deployment protection rules. For more information, see "Using environments for deployment." For information about the API to manage deployment protection rules, see the REST API documentation.

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Deployments" repository permission.

bodyParameters.name: environment
bodyParameters.description: The name of the environment that has the deployment protection rule.

bodyParameters.name: event
bodyParameters.description: The event that triggered the deployment protection rule.

bodyParameters.name: sha
bodyParameters.description: The commit SHA that triggered the workflow. Always populated from the check suite, regardless of whether a deployment is created.

bodyParameters.name: ref
bodyParameters.description: The ref (branch or tag) that triggered the workflow. Always populated from the check suite, regardless of whether a deployment is created.

bodyParameters.name: deployment_callback_url
bodyParameters.description: The URL to review the deployment protection rule.

bodyParameters.name: deployment
bodyParameters.description: A request for a specific ref(branch,sha,tag) to be deployed

childParamsGroups.name: ref
childParamsGroups.description: The ref to deploy. This can be a branch, tag, or sha.

childParamsGroups.name: task
childParamsGroups.description: Parameter to specify a task to execute

childParamsGroups.name: transient_environment
childParamsGroups.description: Specifies if the given environment is will no longer exist at some point in the future. Default: false.

childParamsGroups.name: production_environment
childParamsGroups.description: Specifies if the given environment is one that end-users directly interact with. Default: false.

childParamsGroups.name: number
childParamsGroups.description: Number uniquely identifying the pull request within its repository.

childParamsGroups.name: state
childParamsGroups.description: State of this Pull Request. Either open or closed.

childParamsGroups.name: milestone
childParamsGroups.description: A collection of related issues and pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: permission
childParamsGroups.description: Permission that the team will have for its repositories

childParamsGroups.name: privacy
childParamsGroups.description: The level of privacy this team should have

childParamsGroups.name: notification_setting
childParamsGroups.description: The notification setting the team has set

childParamsGroups.name: ldap_dn
childParamsGroups.description: Distinguished Name (DN) that team maps to within LDAP environment

childParamsGroups.name: organization_id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the organization to which this team belongs

childParamsGroups.name: enterprise_id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the enterprise to which this team belongs

childParamsGroups.name: private
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is private or public.

childParamsGroups.name: size
childParamsGroups.description: The size of the repository, in kilobytes. Size is calculated hourly. When a repository is initially created, the size is 0.

childParamsGroups.name: is_template
childParamsGroups.description: Whether this repository acts as a template that can be used to generate new repositories.

childParamsGroups.name: pull_request_creation_policy
childParamsGroups.description: The policy controlling who can create pull requests: all or collaborators_only.

childParamsGroups.name: disabled
childParamsGroups.description: Returns whether or not this repository disabled.

childParamsGroups.name: visibility
childParamsGroups.description: The repository visibility: public, private, or internal.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_rebase_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow rebase merges for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_squash_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow squash merges for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_auto_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow Auto-merge to be used on pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: delete_branch_on_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to delete head branches when pull requests are merged

childParamsGroups.name: allow_update_branch
childParamsGroups.description: Whether or not a pull request head branch that is behind its base branch can always be updated even if it is not required to be up to date before merging.

childParamsGroups.name: use_squash_pr_title_as_default
childParamsGroups.description: Whether a squash merge commit can use the pull request title as default. **This property is closing down. Please use squash_merge_commit_title instead.

childParamsGroups.name: squash_merge_commit_title
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a squash merge commit title:

  • PR_TITLE - default to the pull request's title.
  • COMMIT_OR_PR_TITLE - default to the commit's title (if only one commit) or the pull request's title (when more than one commit).

childParamsGroups.name: squash_merge_commit_message
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a squash merge commit message:

  • PR_BODY - default to the pull request's body.
  • COMMIT_MESSAGES - default to the branch's commit messages.
  • BLANK - default to a blank commit message.

childParamsGroups.name: merge_commit_title
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a merge commit title.

  • PR_TITLE - default to the pull request's title.
  • MERGE_MESSAGE - default to the classic title for a merge message (e.g., Merge pull request #123 from branch-name).

childParamsGroups.name: merge_commit_message
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a merge commit message.

  • PR_TITLE - default to the pull request's title.
  • PR_BODY - default to the pull request's body.
  • BLANK - default to a blank commit message.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_merge_commit
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow merge commits for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: web_commit_signoff_required
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to require contributors to sign off on web-based commits

childParamsGroups.name: anonymous_access_enabled
childParamsGroups.description: Whether anonymous git access is enabled for this repository

childParamsGroups.name: code_search_index_status
childParamsGroups.description: The status of the code search index for this repository

childParamsGroups.name: private
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is private or public.

childParamsGroups.name: size
childParamsGroups.description: The size of the repository, in kilobytes. Size is calculated hourly. When a repository is initially created, the size is 0.

childParamsGroups.name: is_template
childParamsGroups.description: Whether this repository acts as a template that can be used to generate new repositories.

childParamsGroups.name: pull_request_creation_policy
childParamsGroups.description: The policy controlling who can create pull requests: all or collaborators_only.

childParamsGroups.name: disabled
childParamsGroups.description: Returns whether or not this repository disabled.

childParamsGroups.name: visibility
childParamsGroups.description: The repository visibility: public, private, or internal.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_rebase_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow rebase merges for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_squash_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow squash merges for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_auto_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow Auto-merge to be used on pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: delete_branch_on_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to delete head branches when pull requests are merged

childParamsGroups.name: allow_update_branch
childParamsGroups.description: Whether or not a pull request head branch that is behind its base branch can always be updated even if it is not required to be up to date before merging.

childParamsGroups.name: use_squash_pr_title_as_default
childParamsGroups.description: Whether a squash merge commit can use the pull request title as default. **This property is closing down. Please use squash_merge_commit_title instead.

childParamsGroups.name: squash_merge_commit_title
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a squash merge commit title:

  • PR_TITLE - default to the pull request's title.
  • COMMIT_OR_PR_TITLE - default to the commit's title (if only one commit) or the pull request's title (when more than one commit).

childParamsGroups.name: squash_merge_commit_message
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a squash merge commit message:

  • PR_BODY - default to the pull request's body.
  • COMMIT_MESSAGES - default to the branch's commit messages.
  • BLANK - default to a blank commit message.

childParamsGroups.name: merge_commit_title
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a merge commit title.

  • PR_TITLE - default to the pull request's title.
  • MERGE_MESSAGE - default to the classic title for a merge message (e.g., Merge pull request #123 from branch-name).

childParamsGroups.name: merge_commit_message
childParamsGroups.description:
The default value for a merge commit message.

  • PR_TITLE - default to the pull request's title.
  • PR_BODY - default to the pull request's body.
  • BLANK - default to a blank commit message.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_merge_commit
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow merge commits for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: web_commit_signoff_required
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to require contributors to sign off on web-based commits

childParamsGroups.name: anonymous_access_enabled
childParamsGroups.description: Whether anonymous git access is enabled for this repository

childParamsGroups.name: code_search_index_status
childParamsGroups.description: The status of the code search index for this repository

childParamsGroups.name: author_association
childParamsGroups.description: How the author is associated with the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: auto_merge
childParamsGroups.description: The status of auto merging a pull request.

childParamsGroups.name: draft
childParamsGroups.description: Indicates whether or not the pull request is a draft.

childParamsGroups.name: maintainer_can_modify
childParamsGroups.description: Indicates whether maintainers can modify the pull request.

bodyParameters.name: repository
bodyParameters.description: The repository on GitHub where the event occurred. Webhook payloads contain the repository property when the event occurs from activity in a repository.

bodyParameters.name: organization
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub organization. Webhook payloads contain the organization property when the webhook is configured for an organization, or when the event occurs from activity in a repository owned by an organization.

bodyParameters.name: installation
bodyParameters.description: The GitHub App installation. Webhook payloads contain the installation property when the event is configured for and sent to a GitHub App. For more information, see "Using webhooks with GitHub Apps."
